name: Chocolate Cloud Clusters
recipeInstructions: Line cookie sheet with foil. In top of double boiler, melt milk chocolate with butter until melted and smooth. Set aside to cool. Add pecans, raisins, marshmallows, cereal, and peanut butter chips to the melted chocolate. Stir well after each addition. Drop clusters in spoonfuls onto the cookie sheet. Refrigerate until set.
